Package org.javalabs.jpa

Class LitePersistenceProvider

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.LitePersistenceProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.persistence.spi.PersistenceProvider
public class LitePersistenceProvider extends Object implements jakarta.persistence.spi.PersistenceProvider
Persistence provider for LiTE jpa framework.
Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
